title: Sprint 54 Wave B: Fix "occupiedBy_?" skip reason — handle null ExistingBlock
description:
Evidence: stall message shows "Skip reasons: occupiedBy_?" — the "?" comes from null/empty ExistingBlock in the adapter's blockPlaceSkipped event. When the target block has no existing block (air), the adapter emits existingBlock as empty/null.

Fix: in the BlockPlaceSkippedEvent handler, handle null/empty ExistingBlock gracefully. Map empty to "air" instead of "occupiedBy_?". Also fix the adapter to ensure existingBlock is always a valid string.
